name: skainet-contributor-skills
description: Skills for contributing TO the SKaiNET framework — Kotlin idioms enforced by the project, the multi-module Gradle layout with version catalog, KMP source-set rules, the Java-interop facade convention, and the common in-repo test strategy. Use when editing files inside the SKaiNET repo. Consumer-side skills (using SKaiNET in your own app) live in the sibling skainet-consumer-skills plugin.
